text:
Shishito (シシトウ, Shishitō) was applicant #89 in the 287th Hunter Exam. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 23 

Appearance

Shishito is a tall man with shoulder-length black hair, a long face and a cleft chin. He sports a green long-sleeved shirt with a brown vest over it, which his badge is pinned to. He also wore grey pants and brown shoes.

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

Shishito is first introduced as one of the 24 Hunter examinees to reach the 4th Phase of the Hunter Exam on Zevil Island. The theme of the phase, is a manhunt challenge; to find out who they're hunting, they all have to participate in a lottery to draw a plate with a number corresponding to their target's number badge. On the boat heading to Zevil Island, Shishito ponders who he's the target of. He is eliminated when Amori and Umori take his badge, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 4, Chapter 29 which is ultimately claimed by Hanzo. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 4, Chapter 32
